communications.message: We are investigating reports of slow API response times and intermittent service errors. Our team is actively working to identify the cause and restore normal performance. API requests are processing but may experience significant delays. We will provide an update within 30 minutes.

We have identified the cause of the API performance issues as a configuration change that is preventing our systems from efficiently managing connections. Response times are currently up to 120 times slower than normal, and some requests may fail. Our team is preparing a fix and expects to begin implementation within 15 minutes. Next update in 20 minutes.

We have implemented a fix and are monitoring recovery. API response times are returning to normal levels, and error rates have decreased significantly. Our team is continuing to monitor system performance to ensure full stability before marking this incident as resolved. Next update in 30 minutes.

This incident has been resolved. API performance has returned to normal, and all services are operating as expected. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.

Incident Summary:
• Started: Approximately 6:20 AM PT
• Resolved: 8:45 AM PT
• Duration: ~2 hours 25 minutes
• Impact: API requests experienced severe performance degradation with significantly slower response times and intermittent errors during this period.
